version.name: 0.30-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.30-beta ChangeLog:
+ Preview optimization: Play directly via Reaper API, with the option to choose whether to play the track containing the current item; + Preview优化：通过Reaper API来直接播放，可以选择是否走当前item所在的Track；
-- Mantrika Team --2026.03.04
